title: After the Queen Elizabeth II Cup: It's Decided!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho runs brilliantly. At this point, I'd be
surprised if anyone doubted her ability as a
representative of the Triple Tiara tour runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I set her next race goal as the Takarazuka Kinen,
and propose that she take advantage of the
amazing opportunity it'll present to cast her
magic on the whole world. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides she wants to run in the Yasuda Kinen
as well. While the extreme proximity of the two
races means that committing to both would
normally be out of the question, casting a grand
magic spell requires some degree of abnormality.
